backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Question, Test, TestResult) and backend logic for an ICP-based test platform, including admin management, user registration, question/test CRUD, and leaderboard functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the AddQuestionModal was updated to remove the four option image file pickers, retaining only the question image picker, correct option selector, and submit button.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a reference for the current state of the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with five routes (/, /dashboard, /test/$testId, /admin, /results) and renders the app with a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestio: Admin modal dialog for adding a new question, supporting image upload via base64 encoding and correct-option selection, with form validation and submission via the useAddQuestion hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/Leaderboar: Displays a ranked leaderboard table of students sorted by average score, with color-coded rank badges for top 3 and score badges color-coded by performance tier.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuestionGa: Admin view that lists all questions in a responsive grid with their images and correct answers, and includes a button to open the AddQuestionModal for creating new questions.
frontend/src/components/admin/ResultsLis: Admin table component that displays all test submission results including user ID, test name, score, and submission timestamp, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestBuilde: Admin component for creating new tests by selecting questions, setting name/subject/duration, and managing publish/unpublish state of existing tests.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserList.t: Admin component that fetches and displays all registered users in a table showing their name, class, and contact number.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navbar component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, silently attempts to claim admin on login, and conditionally shows the Admin Panel link only for the designated admin principal.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal overlay for first-time users to set up their profile by entering full name, class, and contact number, with validation before saving to the backend.
Renders a single quiz question with its image and four labeled answer option buttons (A–D), highlighting the selected answer and showing progress (e.g., Q2/10).
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for a test including its name, subject, duration, and question count, with a 'Start Test' button that navigates to the test route.
frontend/src/components/TestTimer.tsx: Countdown timer component that counts down from a given duration in seconds, triggers a callback when time expires, and turns red with a pulsing icon in the last 60 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing admin access control when an admin token is present.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, published tests, questions, test submission, results, leaderboard, and admin CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a navy-blue OKLCH color palette with semantic CSS custom properties for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status, redirecting unauthorized users, and renders tabbed sections for managing questions, tests, users, results, and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page for authenticated users showing stat cards (tests attempted, average score, best score) and a list of published tests, with a profile setup modal if the user has no profile.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing/home page with a hero section, feature highlights, and a CTA button that triggers Internet Identity login or navigates to the dashboard if already authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty leaderboard page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page that displays a table of the authenticated user's past test submissions, showing test name, score, percentage, and submission date.
frontend/src/pages/Test.tsx: Test-taking page that renders questions one at a time with a timer, tracks user answers, handles submission, and shows a post-submission answer review with correct/incorrect indicators.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with navy color palette, OKLCH CSS variables, extended typography/border/shadow tokens, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for 'Concept Delta', a MHT-CET test series app, tracking version, architecture notes, existing features, and known issues for a Motoko/ICP backend with React/TypeScript frontend.
